creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text: I have reported this issue up stream.  As it is purely cosmetical (cf. comment #1), the only thing I'm going to do is report this upstream.  The author has some custom locale handling and I'm not sure if changing character sets would fix anything.  Most likely, it would just make the situation worse as the code base expects string constants to be encoded in ISO-8859-1 (IIRC).
